text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At lunchtime, I spot Gold City and Oguri Cap in
the cafeteria. On their table they have lined up a
ton of bags packed with fancy sweets.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... What was it again you promised?
Farm equipment?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? No! Gifts I got from a modeling gig. You
told me you'd take extras if I couldn't eat them
all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I couldn't imagine not being able to
finish eating something, so I forgot about it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I made sure to keep the ones I got from my fans
separate, so you're welcome to eat all of them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're not going to have any? You know,
Tama says eating with someone else is the best
seasoning.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... I gotta watch my calories. Really
tempting offer, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Trainer, were you listening? Can you
explain to her why I can't eat any?
choice_data_list: Moderation is the key to winning!
Calories are the key to winning!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Right? Not like that's news to anyone here.
Although... they did mix in a few treats from my
favorite store...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I am?! T-true, I do have training after this,
so one bite can't hurt, can it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Gold City enjoys just a tiny bit of the
tasty sweets.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're not serious! B-but, you're right about
needing the energy to perform well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hnnghh... Okay, just for today! Oguri, I highly
recommend that chocolate terrine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Terrine... I thought it was a cake. Then what's in
this tin over here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opening one bag after another, Gold City enjoys
as many sweets as she can manage with Oguri
Cap.
